steps.title: Use the sentence context
steps.content: The uncle says the hardest 'part' of telling a story is finding the beginning. Here, 'part' means one component or aspect of the overall activity of storytelling.

steps.title: Reject literal meanings
steps.content: Choice A means an area, which does not fit an activity. Choice B is related to music, but the sentence is about storytelling. Choice D is an informal word for a shape or mass, not an aspect of a task. The answer is C.
